prompt: Illustrate multiple chart types, drawing inspiration from the variety presented in image 1, but execute them entirely in the vibrant, hand-sketched aesthetic, complete with handwritten labels, as depicted in image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate an image displaying a collection of distinct information graphics and chart types, drawing inspiration from the variety presented in image 1. Each graphic should be rendered in a vibrant, hand-sketched aesthetic, complete with visible sketch lines, scribbled fills, and handwritten labels, as exemplified in image 2.
objects: Collection of distinct information graphics and chart types
Hand-sketched pie chart or donut chart
Visible sketch lines on all graphics
